Ambrosia maritima, also known as "Ambaiba propinqua", is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The most common herbal preparations made with Ambrosia maritima include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems.
